summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: show SHA-256's avalanche property. Top Tex: input A='hello world' (BLUE), input B='hello worle' (GREEN), with note '(only the last character differs)'. Two rows below: the 64-hex-char SHA-256 digests rendered as VGroup of Tex chars, labeled BLUE and GREEN. LaggedStart recolors every differing hex char to RED across both digests. Bottom stats: ~half the hex chars and ~half of 256 output bits flip; digest looks random, no back-calculation.
